title: gerbera lanuginosa
intro: Gerbera lanuginosa, also known as woolly gerbera, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, known for its unique, woolly leaves and small white daisy-like flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Gerbera lanuginosa are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or oil, and can be used in teas, tinctures, and topical creams.
